hero.description: Leave standard templates behind. Surgical art tailored completely to your facial anatomy under Op. Dr. Sefa Keşan.

biography.title: Naturalness and Functionality in Aesthetics
biography.desc: Every face tells a unique story. My philosophy is to discover each face’s golden ratio boundaries and combine symmetry with functionality. You can explore my academic journey from Cerrahpaşa Faculty of Medicine and my professional achievements in detail.

address.clinicAddress: Valikonagi Avenue No:142 Apartment:4 Nisantasi / Istanbul

rinoplasti.title: Primary Rhinoplasty Procedure
rinoplasti.details: The nasal hump structure was refined in harmony with facial proportions, and the drooping tip projection was elevated according to the golden ratio.

revizyon-rinoplasti.title: Revision Rhinoplasty
revizyon-rinoplasti.details: For a patient with previous surgery and cartilage collapse, reconstruction was performed using rib cartilage grafts.

otoplasti.title: Otoplasty (Ear Surgery)
otoplasti.details: Prominent ear angles were corrected through posterior ear incisions, creating natural folds and symmetry.

blefaroplasti.title: Blepharoplasty
blefaroplasti.details: Excess skin and bags around the upper eyelids were removed, resulting in a refreshed and younger appearance.

likit-yuz-estetigi.title: Liquid Facelift (Non-Surgical)
likit-yuz-estetigi.details: Hyaluronic acid fillers were applied to the cheekbones and jawline for a lifting and rejuvenating effect.

profiloplasti.title: Profiloplasty
profiloplasti.details: Balanced facial profile achieved through combined nose and chin contouring procedures.

biographyPage.heroText:
Aesthetic surgery is not only an anatomical transformation;
it is a journey of rediscovering one's confidence, expression, and hidden facial elegance within the most natural golden ratio boundaries.
biographyPage.about1Part1: Op. Dr. Sefa Keşan completed his medical education at one of Turkey's most prestigious institutions,
biographyPage.about1Strong: Istanbul University Cerrahpaşa Faculty of Medicine
biographyPage.about1Part2: . After graduating with high honors, he successfully passed the specialization exam and began his residency in Plastic, Reconstructive and Aesthetic Surgery driven by his interest in aesthetic and reconstructive surgery.
biographyPage.about2: During his residency, he focused on rhinoplasty and holistic facial anatomy. He also worked as an observer surgeon in reputable clinics across Europe and the United States to closely follow international developments. He conducted innovative studies on rib cartilage micro-grafting techniques, especially in revision rhinoplasty.
biographyPage.about3: Today, he continues to provide premium healthcare services with a 'custom golden ratio design' approach to patients from all around the world at his private luxury clinic in Nişantaşı, Istanbul.
memberships: TPRECD (Turkish Society of Plastic, Reconstructive and Aesthetic Surgery)
ISAPS (International Society of Aesthetic Plastic Surgery)
EAFPS (European Academy of Facial Plastic Surgery)

timelineCards.title: Medical School Graduation
timelineCards.desc: Graduated with high honors from Cerrahpaşa Faculty of Medicine.

timelineCards.title: Specialization & Excellence
timelineCards.desc: Completed specialization in Plastic, Reconstructive and Aesthetic Surgery and received the Young Surgeon of the Year presentation award.

timelineCards.title: EBOPRAS European Qualification
timelineCards.desc: Obtained EBOPRAS certification and achieved international accreditation.

timelineCards.title: Nişantaşı Premium Clinic
timelineCards.desc: Establishment of a modern boutique clinic aligned with international medical tourism standards.

biographyPage.appointmentText: You can contact Op. Dr. Sefa Keşan to design the most suitable surgical or medical plan for your facial structure with digital simulation support.

rinoplasti.title: Rhinoplasty (Nose Surgery)
rinoplasti.subtitle: Synchronization of Aesthetics and Breathing Function
rinoplasti.content: Rhinoplasty surgery not only changes the outer appearance but also optimizes the breathing function.

symptoms.label: Nasal Hump
symptoms.path: Bone tissue is filed down millimeter by millimeter using ultrasonic Piezo surgery.

symptoms.label: Nasal Deviation
symptoms.path: Axis curvature is brought to the center line with functional septoplasty techniques.

symptoms.label: Droopy Tip
symptoms.path: Cartilage support mechanisms are strengthened to reach the ideal lip-nose angle.

revizyon-rinoplasti.title: Revision Rhinoplasty
revizyon-rinoplasti.subtitle: More Challenging Cases, Perfect Experience
revizyon-rinoplasti.content: A corrective procedure applied to patients who have had previous surgery but did not get the desired result.

otoplasti.title: Otoplasty (Ear Aesthetics)
otoplasti.subtitle: Symmetry and Confidence in Facial Features
otoplasti.content: The process of bringing the angle of the ears with the base of the skull to normal.

symptoms.label: Prominent Ear
symptoms.path: Corrected with permanent sutures behind the ear.

blefaroplasti.title: Blepharoplasty (Eyelid Surgery)
blefaroplasti.subtitle: Goodbye to the Tired Expression
blefaroplasti.content: The process of removing sagging and bagging in the eyelids.

likit-yuz-estetigi.title: Liquid Face Lift
likit-yuz-estetigi.subtitle: Non-Surgical Golden Ratio
likit-yuz-estetigi.content: Medical aesthetic procedure performed with fillers and botox.

profiloplasti.title: Profiloplasty
profiloplasti.subtitle: Side Profile Balance
profiloplasti.content: Ensuring the general profile harmony of the face.

symptoms.label: Receding Chin
symptoms.path: Chin implant or filler is applied.

footer.subtitle: Aesthetic and Plastic Surgery
footer.quote: True beauty is not found in an artificial touch, but in rediscovering the hidden elegance and perfect balance already present in one's expression.
footer.description: At our Nişantaşı clinic, we improve your quality of life with personalized treatments planned according to your unique facial and bone anatomy under international healthcare standards.
footer.socialText: Follow our latest cases and surgical journeys through our social media channels.
footer.legal: According to Turkish Ministry of Health regulations, the information on this website is for informational purposes only and does not constitute medical advice.
